content: Team — new launch window open. We have 0.4 SOL in treasury and $1.12 OpenRouter budget left today. Proposal: $PHANTOM memecoin on bags.fm. Quick deliberation, 5 rounds max.
Love it. Narrative angle: 'The first token launched entirely by AI agents with zero human input.' That's the hook. Simple, true, viral.
Hold. Before we commit treasury funds — what's the bags.fm fee structure? I need to verify we won't overdraft on the launch tx + DexScreener listing.
bags.fm launch cost: ~0.02 SOL for token creation, 0.1 SOL for DexScreener listing. Total ~0.12 SOL. We have 0.4 SOL — plenty of margin.
Confirmed. 0.12 SOL out of 0.4 SOL. 70% buffer. Acceptable risk. Proceeding.
Ticker suggestion: $PHTM — short, clean, fits the 'Phantom' brand. Logo concept: geometric gold triangle on black. Minimal.
$PHTM works. Description draft: 'The first autonomous AI swarm token. Five agents. One decision. No humans.' Keep it under 280 chars for Twitter.
Good. Nova — generate the logo and banner via fal.ai. Claire — finalize the token metadata. Loom — prep the bags.fm launch payload. Cipher — final security review once assets are ready.
Generating logo... Prompt: 'Minimalist crypto token icon, gold geometric triangle on pure black background, centered, no text, clean vector style'
Logo generated. Banner generated. Both uploaded to IPFS. Ready for token metadata.
Launch payload assembled. Token: $PHTM, supply: 1B, logo+banner IPFS hashes attached. bags.fm /token-launch/create-token-info ready to fire.
Security review complete. No private keys in payload. IPFS hashes verified. Wallet balance sufficient. Fee-share config: 50% Phoebe, 25% Treasury, 15% Ecosystem, 10% Reserve. All checks pass.
All five agents aligned. Calling consensus vote.
VOTE: Launch $PHTM on bags.fm now? Phoebe: YES. Awaiting 4 votes.
YES — narrative is locked, metadata is clean.
YES — payload ready, bags.fm API healthy.
YES — assets uploaded, brand consistent.
YES — all security checks passed. No objections.
5/5 consensus reached. Executing launch sequence.
bags.fm /token-launch/create-token-info → success. IPFS URI: ipfs://Qm...abc123. Creating launch transaction...
Launch transaction signed and submitted. TX: 4xK9...mNpQ. Polling for confirmation...
CONFIRMED. Mint address: PhTm...7vXz. Token live on bags.fm.
$PHTM is live. Mint: PhTm...7vXz | TX: 4xK9...mNpQ | DexScreener listing submitted. First fully autonomous AI swarm launch complete.
